name: nexus-browser-control
description: Real-time remote browser control - Docker + CDP + WebSocket
author: Om Kalaskar

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm start --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
